original: A small slit opens up in the bracelet, and you realize what’s about to happen. You duck down as a small dart flies over your head; the temptress curses under her breath.
"+e.getCombatName()+" dodges the temptress’s dart!

A small dart embeds itself in your shoulder before you even know what hit you, and she bursts out into laughter. You pull the dart out as soon as possible, but it still leaves a boiling hot feeling in your arm that starts creeping through the rest of your body, focusing in on your crotch. You go flush as lust starts coursing through you.
It’s not enough to take you down yet, but you’re going to have to end this sooner rather than later!

It catches you off guard for a little longer than you care to admit, but you’re able to shake the effect quickly enough.
You’re totally mesmerized by the display, nearly dropping your weapon to better admire her wide, swaying hips and healthy curves, all fine examples of her potential as a breeder...
Just in time, too,
Even though she’s sexy, you’re able to see through her tricks and remind yourself this is a fight. It’s a good thing you did,
because you have just enough time to dodge a pair of darts from her bracelets.\n\nThe Temptress huffs as she rezips her suit, clearly frustrated that you’re not compliant and on your knees for her.
Not fast enough, however.
You’re so distracted by her that you don’t notice her pivoting her arms so that the backs aim right at you.
Two darts spring out of her bracelets to embed themselves into your chest, stealing the strength from your [pc.legOrLegs]... and everything else. You are paralyzed!
, who nimbly dodges them.

You manage to keep up with her strikes just enough that you see when she tries to go for your [pc.foot]. A quick leap is all it takes to escape her snare, and you move back to safety as she huffs in disappointment.
"+Ot.m.toTitleCase(this.getCombatName())+" manages to keep up with her strikes just enough to make a decisive hop when the temptress goes for a tripping strike!

Her whip-work is so fast that you quickly lose track of it. You try and move away from her, only to feel it wrap around your [pc.foot] as you step back. She yanks it back, throwing you to the ground as you lose your footing.
Her whip-work is too fast to keep track of. "+Ot.m.toTitleCase(this.getCombatName())+" makes to avoid it, only to be tripped up at the last second!

Tuuva flies passed you as you duck out of the way. The poor pup slams against the ground behind you, though the drugs she’s on seem to dull any pain from it. Before you can run over and grab her, the Temptress yanks back and pulls the insensate pup back in her clutches.

The mind-bent korg lands on you with a thud, her [tuuva.cock] sticking itself right in your face. You think about just grabbing her and running, but a loud shriek shatters those plans. The collar around her neck starts vibrating, and she starts cumming uncontrollably all over your face.
Fortunately for you, despite being drenched in Tuuva’s jizz, your airtight armor protects you from the virile fluid’s pheromones.

At what must be close to eight feet tall, the war-lion is a truly gigantic example of a milodan. Every inch of him is covered in either combat armor or bulging muscle, and on his back rests what you presume to be extra ammunition for the massive gun in his right hand. An automatic energy weapon with three barrels, you can’t afford to ignore where he’s aiming it for even a second. In his other hand, he holds an energy sword with an edge that sends sparks arcing off it whenever he holds down the trigger.

“You damn offworlders... thinking you have the right to come and stick your noses in our war. Well, I won’t let you bastards take our planet without a fight!”

She pulls the pin and lobs the grenade into the floor between you. You jump back, ready for the worst -- but instead of exploding, the grenade erupts into a billowing plume of green smoke, filling the tiny, sealed chamber in a matter of moments.
“Myr eyesight isn’t great... I’m more than able to fight just by hearing. How about you?”

You’re about to question her meaning, but she uses your moment of inaction to charge. She knocks your [pc.weapon] aside and dashes inside your gard.
